languages.text: Себериан фон Валанциус, узнав о требовании Тразина, согласился на предложенную ксеносом сделку. Его верность принадлежит династии, а без Патента ее попросту не существует.
Seberian von Valancius, having learned of Trazyn's demand, has agreed to the xenos's proposal. His loyalty lies with his dynasty, and without the Warrant, House von Valancius simply cannot exist.
languages.original_text: Себериан фон Валанциус, узнав о требовании Тразина, согласился на предложенную ксеносом сделку. Его верность принадлежит династии, а без Патента ее попросту не существует.

Seberian von Valancius, having learned of Trazyn's demand, has agreed to the xenos's proposal. His loyalty lies with his dynasty, and without the Warrant, House von Valancius simply cannot exist.

languages.text: シベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスはトラズンの要求を知り、その提案に同意した。彼の忠誠は彼の家系にある。そして、その証書なしにフォン・ヴァランシウス家は存在できない。
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius, having learned of Trazyn's demand, has agreed to the xenos's proposal. His loyalty lies with his dynasty, and without the Warrant, House von Valancius simply cannot exist.

traits.locale_text: シベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスはトラズンの要求を知り、その提案に同意した。彼の忠誠は彼の家系にある。そして、その証書なしにフォン・ヴァランシウス家は存在できない。

languages.text: Seberian von Valancius, al conocer las exigencias de Trazyn, acepta la propuesta del xenos. Su lealtad es hacia la dinastía, y sin la Patente la casa von Valancius no existe.
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius, having learned of Trazyn's demand, has agreed to the xenos's proposal. His loyalty lies with his dynasty, and without the Warrant, House von Valancius simply cannot exist.

traits.locale_text: Seberian von Valancius, al conocer las exigencias de Trazyn, acepta la propuesta del xenos. Su lealtad es hacia la dinastía, y sin la Patente la casa von Valancius no existe.

languages.text: Als Seberian von Valancius von Trazyns Forderung erfuhr, erklärte er sich bereit, auf das Angebot des Xenos einzugehen. Seine Loyalität gilt der Dynastie, und ohne den Handelsbrief kann Haus von Valancius einfach nicht existieren.
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius, having learned of Trazyn's demand, has agreed to the xenos's proposal. His loyalty lies with his dynasty, and without the Warrant, House von Valancius simply cannot exist.

traits.locale_text: Als Seberian von Valancius von Trazyns Forderung erfuhr, erklärte er sich bereit, auf das Angebot des Xenos einzugehen. Seine Loyalität gilt der Dynastie, und ohne den Handelsbrief kann Haus von Valancius einfach nicht existieren.

languages.text: En apprenant la nouvelle, Seberian von Valancius a décidé de se plier aux exigences du xénos. Il voue une loyauté sans faille à sa dynastie et sait que sans sa lettre de marque, la maison von Valancius est condamnée à disparaître.
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius, having learned of Trazyn's demand, has agreed to the xenos's proposal. His loyalty lies with his dynasty, and without the Warrant, House von Valancius simply cannot exist.

traits.locale_text: En apprenant la nouvelle, Seberian von Valancius a décidé de se plier aux exigences du xénos. Il voue une loyauté sans faille à sa dynastie et sait que sans sa lettre de marque, la maison von Valancius est condamnée à disparaître.

languages.text: 塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯在得知特拉金的要求后，同意了该异形的提议。他的忠诚归于家族王朝。若失去贸易授状，冯·瓦兰修斯家族便无从存续。
languages.original_text: Seberian von Valancius, having learned of Trazyn's demand, has agreed to the xenos's proposal. His loyalty lies with his dynasty, and without the Warrant, House von Valancius simply cannot exist.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯在得知特拉金的要求后，同意了该异形的提议。他的忠诚归于家族王朝。若失去贸易授状，冯·瓦兰修斯家族便无从存续。

languages.text: Trazyn'in talebini öğrenen Seberian von Valancius, zenonun teklifini kabul etti. Kendisinin sadakati hanedanlığına ve Ruhsatname olmadan von Valancius Hanesi var olamaz.
